contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 240
- Description: Sophia incident-response night: recover bricked threads + ship the self-brick guards
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/163
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/178
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/181
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/182
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/457
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/472
  
  Details:
  Production incident-response + hardening for Sophia (truesight_autopilot), continuing after the prior 210-min report.
  
  INCIDENT RESPONSE (multiple production bricks diagnosed + recovered live on the box): (a) a NameError (_is_progress_query referenced but undefined, merged via PR #161) that 500'd every mid-turn message — root-caused and hotfixed; (b) repeated thread bricks from Sophia SIGKILL-restarting herself mid-turn (severs in-flight turns + wedges the Telegram adapter) — diagnosed and recovered the wedged adapter several times; (c) 'empty response' bricks on Stream-of-consciousness (780) and the handoff threads (2622/2744) from degenerate sessions — manually repaired/reset poisoned sessions (consecutive-user pile-ups + 400K-char contexts stuffed with binary/oversized tool-results), backing up each first; (d) restored the vault page diagnosis (Starlette TemplateResponse arg-order 500).
  
  DURABLE FIXES SHIPPED (with tests, deployed + verified):
  - #163 hotfix: define the missing _is_progress_query classifier (unblock mid-turn messages).
  - #178 self-heal degenerate threads: collapse consecutive user messages (empty-response trap) + gate the generic handoff prefix to go-signals only (stop chat-thread confusion).
  - #181 idle-drain guard before self-restart (deploy_autopilot defers while any thread is mid-turn) + tool-result truncation at 8K (stop context-bloat poison).
  - #182 block raw self-restart/kill in ssh_run (close the guard bypass; deploy_autopilot is the only sanctioned restart path).
  
  HANDOFFS authored + parked GO-ready for Sophia: Live Progress introspection plan (#457, thread 2799) and the Vault Hotfix + Ops-Safety roll-up (#472, thread 2744). Net: the entire self-brick failure class (dangling tool_calls, user pile-ups, handoff-prefix noise, tool-result bloat, self-restart-mid-turn) is now shut at the code level.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 400.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
